name: Diagnostic Medical Systems S.A.
summary: Diagnostic Medical Systems S.A. operates in the medical imaging industry in France. It offers radiography/fluoroscopy, retrofit kits, mammography, chest and bone rooms, mobiles, bone densitometry, 3D reconstruction, mobile C-arms, and posturology solutions. The company also exports its products. Diagnostic Medical Systems S.A. was founded in 1979 and is based in Mauguio, France.
